platform_git: n/a (tarball distribution - sentinel hashes recorded below)
network_policy: egress allow-list (github/raw.githubusercontent/pypi/npm/anthropic-api only); all model-provider and HF hosts 403 host_not_allowed
provider_keys: present in frozen .env (Gemini x8, Groq x4, OpenRouter x4, Serper x4, Tavily x4 - names only; values never read or loaded)
